'''''UFC 162: Silva vs. Weidman''''' was a [[mixed martial arts]] event on July 6, 2013, at the [[MGM Grand Garden Arena]] in [[Las Vegas, Nevada]].<ref>{{cite web | url= http://www.ufc.com/event/UFC162 | title= UFC 162: Fight Card | publisher= Ultimate Fighting Championship (UFC) | access-date= June 29, 2013}}</ref>

==Background==
The main event was a [[UFC Middleweight Championship]] bout between long time title holder [[Anderson Silva]] and undefeated top contender [[Chris Weidman]].<ref name="UFC162">{{cite web|url=http://www.mmamania.com/2013/3/6/4071678/anderson-silva-vs-chris-weidman-official-for-ufc-162-headliner-on|title=Anderson Silva vs. Chris Weidman official for UFC 162 headliner on July 6 in Las Vegas|publisher=MMAmania.com|author=Brian Hemminger |date=2013-03-06|access-date=2013-03-06}}</ref>

Also, co-featured on the card was expected to be a bout between top featherweight contenders [[Ricardo Lamas]] and [[Chan Sung Jung]]; however on June 14, it was announced that Jung had been pulled from the Lamas bout and would replace an injured [[Anthony Pettis]] to face [[José Aldo]] on August 3, 2013, at [[UFC 163]].<ref name="PettisOut/JungIn">{{cite web|url=http://www.bloodyelbow.com/2013/6/14/4429832/ufc-163-pettis-out-chan-sung-jung-vs-jose-aldo|title=Anthony Pettis out of UFC 163 with injury, Chan Sung Jung to face Jose Aldo|publisher=bloodyelbow.com|author=Nate Wilcox|date=2013-06-14|access-date=2013-06-14|archive-date=2013-10-16|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20131016062754/http://www.bloodyelbow.com/2013/6/14/4429832/ufc-163-pettis-out-chan-sung-jung-vs-jose-aldo|url-status=dead}}</ref>  As a result, Lamas was pulled from the event.<ref>{{cite web|url=http://www.mmajunkie.com/news/2013/06/ricardo-lamas-off-ufc-162-tim-boetsch-mark-munoz-promoted-to-main-card|title=Ricardo Lamas off UFC 162, Tim Boetsch-Mark Munoz promoted to main card|publisher=mmajunkie.com|author=Matt Erickson|date=2013-06-18|access-date=2013-06-18|archive-date=2013-06-21|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20130621060613/http://www.mmajunkie.com/news/2013/06/ricardo-lamas-off-ufc-162-tim-boetsch-mark-munoz-promoted-to-main-card|url-status=dead}}</ref>

A bout between [[Thiago Silva (fighter)|Thiago Silva]] and [[Rafael Cavalcante]], briefly linked to this event, was moved to [[UFC on Fuel TV: Nogueira vs. Werdum]].<ref name="Silva/Cavalcante">{{cite web|url=http://www.bloodyelbow.com/2013/3/10/4086098/report-thiago-silva-vs-rafael-cavalcante-ufc-on-fuel-tv-10-mma-news|title=Thiago Silva vs. Rafael Cavalcante moved to UFC on Fuel TV 10|publisher=bloodyelbow.com|author=Mookie Alexander |date=2013-03-10|access-date=2013-03-10}}</ref>

[[John Makdessi]] was expected to face [[Edson Barboza]] at the event; however, Makdessi, pulled out of the bout citing an injury and was replaced by [[Rafaello Oliveira]].<ref>{{cite web|url=http://www.mmafighting.com/2013/5/30/4382024/edson-barboza-faces-rafaello-oliveira-at-ufc-162-following-john|title=Edson Barboza faces Rafaello Oliveira at UFC 162 following John Makdessi injury |publisher=mmafighting.com|author=Ariel Helwani |date=2013-05-30|access-date=2013-05-30}}</ref>

[[Shane del Rosario]] was originally scheduled to face [[Dave Herman (fighter)|Dave Herman]] at the event; however, del Rosario was forced off the card due to injury and replaced by [[Gabriel Gonzaga]].<ref>{{cite web|url=http://www.mmajunkie.com/news/2013/05/shane-del-rosario-forced-out-at-ufc-162-dave-herman-now-meets-gabriel-gonzaga|title=Shane del Rosario forced out at UFC 162, Dave Herman now meets Gabriel Gonzaga|publisher=mmajunkie.com|date=2013-05-31|access-date=2013-06-01|archive-date=2013-06-08|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20130608092614/http://www.mmajunkie.com/news/2013/05/shane-del-rosario-forced-out-at-ufc-162-dave-herman-now-meets-gabriel-gonzaga|url-status=dead}}</ref>

==Bonus awards==
The following fighters received $50,000 bonuses.<ref>{{cite web|url=http://mmajunkie.com/2013/07/ufc-162-bonuses-weidman-swanson-siver-edgar-oliveira-earn-honors|title=UFC 162 bonuses: Weidman, Swanson, Siver, Edgar, Oliveira earn $50,000 |publisher=mmajunkie.com |author=Staff|date=2013-07-07|access-date=2013-07-07}}</ref>

* '''Fight of The Night: Frankie Edgar vs. Charles Oliveira''' and '''Cub Swanson vs. Dennis Siver'''
* '''Knockout of The Night: Chris Weidman'''
* '''Submission of the Night:''' None awarded as no matches ended by submission

==Reported payout==
The following is the reported payout to the fighters as reported to the [[Nevada State Athletic Commission]]. It does not include sponsor money and also does not include the UFC's traditional "fight night" bonuses.<ref>{{cite web|url=http://www.mmajunkie.com/news/2013/07/ufc-162-salaries-chris-weidman-gets-48k-ex-champ-anderson-silva-paid-600k|title=UFC 162 salaries: Chris Weidman gets $48K, ex-champ Anderson Silva paid $600K|publisher=MMAjunkie.com|date=2013-07-08|access-date=2013-07-08|author=Staff|archive-date=2013-07-10|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20130710183341/http://www.mmajunkie.com/news/2013/07/ufc-162-salaries-chris-weidman-gets-48k-ex-champ-anderson-silva-paid-600k|url-status=dead}}</ref>
* '''Chris Weidman:''' $48,000 (includes $24,000 win bonus) def. Anderson Silva: $600,000
* '''Frankie Edgar:''' $240,000 (includes $120,000 win bonus) def. Charles Oliveira: $21,000
* '''Tim Kennedy:''' $90,000 (includes $30,000 win bonus) def. Roger Gracie: $50,000
* '''Mark Muñoz:''' $84,000 (includes $42,000 win bonus) def. Tim Boetsch: $37,000
* '''Cub Swanson:''' $58,000 (includes $29,000 win bonus) def. Dennis Siver: $33,000
* '''Andrew Craig:''' $24,000 (includes $12,000 win bonus) def. Chris Leben: $51,000
* '''Norman Parke:''' $30,000 (includes $15,000 win bonus) def. Kazuki Tokudome: $8,000
* '''Gabriel Gonzaga:''' $58,000 (includes $29,000 win bonus) def. Dave Herman: $23,000
* '''Edson Barboza:''' $46,000 (includes $23,000 win bonus) def. Rafaello Oliveira: $14,000
* '''Brian Melancon:''' $16,000 (includes $8,000 win bonus) def. Seth Baczynski: $16,000
* '''Mike Pierce:''' $56,000 (includes $28,000 win bonus) def. David Mitchell: $10,000
